svg.aria-label: Panel inventory — the 10 spatial panels the demo exposes
svg.text: TEN SPATIAL PANELS · EVERY ONE A LIVE TENSOR
draggable · dockable · screen-anchored in Universe mode · hides behind orbs in HUD mode (press P)
